summary: The week of June 28–July 5, 2026 is dominated by three cross-platform titans: the Medicube PDRN Pink Collagen Balm (TikTok Shop's #1 Q2 product at $16.99M GMV, now also surging on Amazon), Toplux Magnesium supplements (#2 at $14.23M as magnesium hits an all-time Google search high), and Portable Neck Fans (60K+ Amazon monthly buyers + peak summer Google searches + TikTok Shop seasonal momentum). Dropshippers have the strongest possible signal in K-beauty skincare and wellness supplements, with the bladeless neck fan representing the biggest opportunistic summer play before peak heat-season demand cools.
